title: Sculk Vault
description: Adds some sculky features to make the ancient cities more enticing
body:
This small mod introduces a few new things crafted from materials found in the Ancient Cities that allow you to play with experience in new ways. 

# Sculk Vault
The Sculk Vault is a block that attracts and stores experience. When there is experience available, you can click on this block with a bottle to turn it into a bottle o' enchanting and retrieve some of the stores experience.  

## Recipe
The sculk vault can be crafted using the following recipe. 
![The sculk vault is crafted from 5 echo shards, a sculk catalyst, and 3 lapis blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8c7e9ab4a8f2338e553e9c2eff92b5c7ee0f1c3.png)


# Sculk Vial
The sculk vial is an item that collects experience. When it is in your inventory, it will spend its experience to repair any items you're using if they're enchanted with mending. You can right click in the air to empty the experience stored in it out into the world, or right click on a sculk vault to fill the vial.   

## Recipes
Sculk vials can be crafted using the following recipe. 
![The sculk vial is crafted from 8 echo shards surrounding a glass bottle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c0eec200555a4f4540fd4845d50868d2cae6871.png)

Sculk vials can have their capacity increased up to twice using the following recipe. 
![The sculk vial can be upgraded by surrounding it with 8 echo shards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7f69e784ffc688255b5ce832b62da576affaf4f.png)
